creator: 3226388001@jcom.home.ne.jp
text:
Hi,

I've tested with teac ud-501 and found that the following patch was 
necessary to use higher sampling rates without setting/fixing hw.usb.uaudio.default_rate.

DSD (DoP) 2.8/5.6 is also working with (slightly modified) musicpd.


root{src}% svn info
Path: .
Working Copy Root Path: /usr/src
URL: svn://svn.freebsd.org/base/releng/10.0
Relative URL: ^/releng/10.0
Repository Root: svn://svn.freebsd.org/base
Repository UUID: ccf9f872-aa2e-dd11-9fc8-001c23d0bc1f
Revision: 260982
Node Kind: directory
Schedule: normal
Last Changed Author: gjb
Last Changed Rev: 260787
Last Changed Date: 2014-01-17 03:33:10 +0900 (Fri, 17 Jan 2014)

root{src}% svn diff
Index: sys/dev/sound/usb/uaudio.c
===================================================================
--- sys/dev/sound/usb/uaudio.c  (revision 260982)
+++ sys/dev/sound/usb/uaudio.c  (working copy)
@@ -182,7 +182,7 @@
        struct uaudio_softc *sc;
 };

-#define        CHAN_MAX_ALT 20
+#define        CHAN_MAX_ALT 24

 struct uaudio_chan_alt {
        union uaudio_asf1d p_asf1d;
@@ -1883,6 +1883,10 @@
 /* This structure defines all the supported rates. */

 static const uint32_t uaudio_rate_list[CHAN_MAX_ALT] = {
+       384000,
+       352800,
+       192000,
+       176400,
        96000,
        88200,
        88000,
root{src}%
